data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution expiry window support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attribution expiry window support', but there is no evidence provided that confirms its existence. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this support, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence related to this requirement, indicating a gap in the required functionality. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement cannot be assessed at this time.
gaps: No evidence of attribution expiry window support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of attribution expiry window support.
